overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates multi-lane streets illuminated by streetlights and vibrant neon signage, passing commercial buildings and a distinctive large pink-lit stadium structure. Heavy rain and fog create a moody, atmospheric environment characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach with metal guardrails

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on a multi-lane highway through heavy rain, maintaining speed while approaching the city center

entered.detail: metal safety barrier running along the left side of the elevated highway
metal safety barrier running along the right side of the road
tall street lamps illuminating the foggy highway ahead
large overhead road sign or bridge structure spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway during a heavy downpour at night. The road is flanked by metal guardrails and illuminated by periodic streetlights cutting through the fog. The dashboard is visible in the foreground as the vehicle approaches the denser urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street lined with neon-lit storefronts and shops

events.description: exits highway and enters commercial district with vibrant neon signage and shop fronts

agents.ego_description: navigating through city streets lined with bright neon signs and commercial buildings, slowing slightly for traffic

notable_agents.action: car driving parallel in the adjacent lane through the commercial district

entered.detail: multi-story building with illuminated windows and signage
building facade with various neon advertisements and shop signs
covered entrance to a storefront visible from the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a bustling commercial district where buildings are adorned with vibrant neon signs in various colors. The street is narrower than the highway, with shops and businesses visible on both sides. Other vehicles share the road as the rain continues to fall heavily.

scene_state.functional_zone: major arterial road alongside a massive illuminated stadium with pink neon framework

events.description: large pink neon stadium structure becomes visible on the left side, dominating the skyline
approaching and passing the gas station area on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: cruising alongside the distinctive pink-lit stadium structure, maintaining steady speed through the wet streets

notable_agents.action: large truck driving in the left lane alongside the stadium structure

entered.detail: massive architectural structure with exposed framework glowing in intense pink and purple neon lights
fuel station with illuminated signage and canopy visible on the right side
elevated road crossing above the current street level

segments.scene_description: The drive continues alongside a massive and striking stadium structure illuminated with intense pink and purple neon lights that dominate the left side of the view. The architecture features exposed girders and framework glowing against the rainy night sky. A gas station becomes visible on the right as the vehicle progresses through this iconic cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed industrial and commercial area with road barriers and utility buildings

events.description: passing the pink stadium structure, entering more industrial area with fewer neon lights

agents.ego_description: continuing through the rainy streets past the gas station, navigating through slightly more industrial surroundings

entered.detail: utilitarian concrete building with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: Having passed the stadium, the vehicle drives through a transitional area featuring industrial buildings and road barriers. The neon intensity decreases slightly, replaced by standard street lighting and the glow of the vehicle's own lights reflecting off the wet pavement. The journey continues through the persistently rainy urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from a desolate elevated highway into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins on a rain-slicked overpass flanked by metal guardrails, where periodic streetlights struggle to pierce through a heavy downpour and thick fog. As the vehicle advances, the open road narrows and the atmosphere shifts from isolated gray tones to a kaleidoscope of color. The scene then expands into a bustling urban center, where the surrounding architecture becomes densely packed with glowing neon signage and commercial storefronts. Finally, the camera navigates through the heavy rain alongside other vehicles, fully immersed in the saturated light of the city.

The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from the overwhelming glow of a neon landmark into a more muted industrial urban corridor. It begins alongside a massive stadium structure, where intense pink and purple neon lights illuminate exposed girders against the rainy night sky. As the vehicle progresses, a gas station appears on the right before the vibrant colors of the stadium fade from view. The scene then shifts into a transitional area characterized by industrial buildings and road barriers, where the neon intensity decreases. Finally, the environment settles into a moodier atmosphere, with standard street lighting and the vehicle's own headlights reflecting off the persistently wet pavement.
